nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I've used it to begin research into things I have limited experience with

nodes.label: AI for verifying realism without altering creative output
nodes.grounding_span: I'll write a scene and then put it into an LLM and ask if it seems plausible

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: ask what other parts of the scene i may have overlooked

nodes.label: AI as foundational structure provider
nodes.grounding_span: ask it to write what basically amounts to a trellis that I can build the actual story around

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: putting my writing into the model for feedback allows me to look at it critically

nodes.label: AI as writing substitute
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't feel fully mine because the words are my art form

nodes.label: AI as threat to professional writing career
nodes.grounding_span: concerned about people not paying human writers to do what AI can do more quickly

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't feel fully mine because the words are my art form

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity in writing
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I can write faster because the research isn't as daunting

nodes.label: Creative fulfillment and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: it helps clarify how you feel about how your character should react

nodes.label: Fair compensation for human writers
nodes.grounding_span: concerned about people not paying human writers

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as research catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: It felt very helpful to be able to have a relevant conversation

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for critical feedback
nodes.grounding_span: A lot of benefit can be achieved by being mindful about how you feel about feedback

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI-generated writing
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't feel fully mine because the words are my art form

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing human writers
nodes.grounding_span: I'm a little concerned about people not paying human writers

nodes.label: Selective and independent AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: The models often ask to write segments for me, but I prefer to do the writing part myself

nodes.label: Reflective learning from AI output — adapts AI suggestions into own skills
nodes.grounding_span: if someone/something tells you, 'your character should say, wow!' and as a creator that feels wrong, it helps clarify how you feel
